ASR Outdoor 360 Degree Standard Plug-in UV Light Bug Zapper Metal Hanging Hook

While summer and warmer temperatures usually mean barbecues, pool days, patio parties, outdoor dinners, camping and numerous other outdoor activities; unfortunately, this warm weather also usually means bugs! Wherever you are, the last thing you want are pesky bugs and insects bothering you, your friends and family or your guests. To ward off mosquitoes, fruit flies, gnats, moths and more, employ the ASR Outdoor 360 Degree Standard Plug-in UV Light Bug Zapper with Hanging Hook.

Plugging into any standard outlet, you’ll have endless hours of 360-degree bug zapping action at your fingertips indoors or out. Simply place on a flat surface or hang with the convenient metal hook and let it go to work while you carry on with your day or evening. Emitting a 365nm wavelength to attract unwanted insects or bugs, the mosquito bug zapper lantern covers up to approximately 400 square feet and kills them with a 1000 V high voltage shock.

Key Features

  • UNLIMITED BUG ZAPPING HOURS: This 360 degree UV light bug zapper plugs in to a standard outlet, giving you endless hours of effective and efficient bug killing time; Emitting a 365nm wavelength to attract unwanted mosquitos, flies, moths, gnats and other insects or bugs, the bug zapper tool covers up to approximately 400 square feet and kills them with a 1000 V high voltage shock
  • SAFE FOR HUMANS AND PETS: The lightweight bug zapper can be used either indoors or outside and uses no harmful chemicals, pesticides or toxic substances, making it a clean and ecofriendly choice for killing unwanted bugs or insects; the exterior ABS plastic cage ensures your little ones and pets cannot reach the high voltage interior power grid
  • EASY TO CLEAN: The ASR Outdoor mosquito killer bug zapper lamp features a detachable tray at the bottom of the tool for removing dead bugs and insects; simply pop it off and dispose of dead bugs, rinse as needed and reattach to bug zapping device; easy and effective
  • ULTRA QUIET: Simply place the bug zapper on a flat, even surface or easily hang from provided metal hook and let the tool go to work; no more hunting with useless plastic fly swatters, chasing mosquitoes or annoying buzzing interruptions, the bug zapper will effectively, efficiently and quietly ward off unwanted pesky bugs and insects for hours on end
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 8.25” tall x 4” wide; Weight: 1.25lbs; Cord: 55” long (included); Material: ABS plastic; Color: Black

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRUVBZ-500
  • UPC: 843884908907
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 8.25 in

If you’re worried about the high voltage interior power grid, don’t fret. The UV light electric power grid is completely surrounded by durable, ABS plastic to ensure your little ones and pets won’t be hurt if they touch it. What’s also great about this mosquito killer tool is that is eco-friendly, requiring no use of toxic substances, pesticides or harmful chemicals, making it an environmentally-friendly choice for your home, pool deck, patio, cabin, cottage, campsite, RV, motor home and more.

The ASR Outdoor mosquito killer bug zapper lamp is exceptionally easy to keep clean, as it features a detachable tray at the bottom of the device for removing dead bugs and insects; simply pop it off and dispose of dead bugs, rinse as needed, and reattach to bug zapping device; easy and effective! Lastly, the ASR Outdoor 360 Degree Standard Plug-in UV Light Bug Zapper with Hanging Hook is also incredibly quiet; no more hunting with useless plastic fly swatters, chasing mosquitoes or annoying buzzing interruptions, the bug zapper will effectively, efficiently and quietly ward off unwanted pesky bugs and insects for hours on end at your desired location.

Dimensions: 8.25” tall x 4” wide; Cord: 55” long (included)
